rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious Registry Import
id: bb406664-ae52-4ea2-bde5-0a0cf0438aca
description: Some malware droppers consist of a single .reg file that writes a base64
  encoded payload into registry and creates a Run key for execution/persistence. Investigate
  where the .reg file comes from and if possible, if it creates any suspicious registry
  keys.
status: stable
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson
date: 2024-08-19
logsource:
  product: windows
  category: process_creation
detection:
  selection_reg_import:
    Image|endswith: \regedit.exe
    CommandLine|contains: .reg
  selection_suspicious_path:
    CommandLine|contains:
    - \Downloads\
    - \Local\Temp\
  condition: all of selection*
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: medium
tags:
- attack.initial-access
- attack.execution
- attack.persistence
- attack.t1547.001
